title: The Iran War Sent Shock Waves Through Asia That Are Likely to Spread
summary: The Asia-Pacific was hit hard and quick by the war in Iran and its energy bottlenecks. Scenes of crisis there indicate that problems are multiplying and spreading.

title: Syrian Billionaires Needed a Favor in Washington. They Invoked the Trump Name.
summary: The attempt by the Khayyats to influence foreign policy while discussions are underway about potential Trump family deals is an increasingly common feature of the president’s second term.

title: U.S. Military Strikes a Boat in the Caribbean, Killing 3
summary: The latest attack raised the death toll to at least 180 in the campaign by the United States against people it accuses of smuggling drugs at sea.

title: Democrats Eye a Broader Battlefield to Capture Congress in November
summary: Weighed down by President Trump’s approval ratings, some Republican incumbents are struggling to raise money while Democrats look for targets like a Tennessee seat south of Nashville.

title: Are Democrats Becoming a Party of Tax Cuts?
summary: As Democrats try to find a way back to power in Washington, some see tax cuts as a quick and easy way to address affordability. The wonks are freaking out.

title: Muslim Southerners Face a Fresh Wave of Hateful Political Rhetoric
summary: Some Muslim voters were once drawn to Republican positions on family values and individual liberty, but as Southern politicians stoke anti-Islamic sentiment, many feel threatened.

title: Trump Administration Demand for Ballot Info Rebuffed by Michigan
summary: The Department of Justice is seeking ballots and other materials from the 2024 election. Michigan officials call it election interference.

title: Americans Living Abroad for Lower Costs Now Say Returning Home Is Too Expensive
summary: Americans have enjoyed lifestyles that would normally be out of reach to them by working remotely in countries with lower living costs.

title: From Pulpit to Pews, Trump and Pope Are on the Minds of Catholics
summary: At churches with connections to Pope Leo and the Trump administration, pastors and parishioners speak out on the feud between the president and the pontiff.

title: A Mild-Mannered Pope Finds His Voice
summary: Leo XIV has had a reputation for being cautious. But since President Trump attacked him at the start of his Africa trip, he has been more combative.

title: Haunted by ‘Dark Thoughts,’ Louisiana Father Kills 8 Children
summary: Seven of the eight children killed were the shooter’s own. Two other people were gravely wounded. The gunman, who was struggling with mental health problems, died in a confrontation with police.

title: The Help That Many Older Americans Need Most
summary: With shortages of medical professionals and an aging population, thousands of community health care workers prevent older adults from falling through the cracks.

title: Don Schlitz, Prolific Writer of Country Music Hits, Dies at 73
summary: He won a Grammy for the Kenny Rogers song “The Gambler,” and also wrote for Randy Travis, the Judds and Mary Chapin Carpenter.

title: A Humanoid Robot Races to a Record Half-Marathon Finish
summary: The android won a half-marathon for robots (and humans) on Sunday in Beijing, achieving a technological milestone while finishing faster than any person in history.

title: Does the Trump Administration Really Want More Teen Pregnancies?
summary: The new Title X guidance from the Trump administration mentions contraception only once.

title: Older Women Are in Demand by Younger Men
summary: What a shift in the dating preferences of younger men reveals about our changing norms.

title: Bulgarian Voters Back New Political Coalition Led by Radev
summary: With its citizens yearning for the kind of prosperous life enjoyed by other Europeans, Bulgaria held its eighth election in five years.

title: Michigan Gas Clerk Helps Save Kidnapped Teen Girl Who Mouthed ‘Help’
summary: A fellow student who had witnessed the kidnapping called the police, and other students helped track the girl to a gas station.

title: Gwendolyn Chisolm, Who Rhymed on Rap’s First Female Hit, Dies at 66
summary: A chance encounter led to overnight success for the Sequence, a seminal trio whose “Funk You Up” broke barriers.

title: Mexico Car Accident Kills 4 Drug Investigators in Chihuahua.
summary: Two of the victims were American and two were Mexican, the authorities in Chihuahua said. The accident took place on a treacherous mountain road.
